headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Essex Property Trust, Raises Price Target to $297
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst James Feldman   maintains Essex Property Trust (NYSE:ESS) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $280 to $297.
